Your AI Assistants

Visitor Follow-up Agent

Create personalized 6-week email sequences for new visitors with just a few clicks.

Get Started

Weekly Newsletter Agent

Transform your weekly highlights into beautiful, professional newsletters instantly.

Get Started

💡 Quick Tips

Welcome New Visitors Warmly

Send your first follow-up email within 24 hours of their visit. First impressions matter!

Keep Newsletters Consistent

Try to send your newsletter on the same day each week to build reader expectations.

Personalize When Possible

Edit the AI-generated content to add personal touches — your congregation will appreciate it.

⚠️ Configuration Required

To enable all features, please configure your environment variables in .env.local:

  • • NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL - Your Supabase project URL
  • • NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY - Your Supabase anonymous key
  • • OPENAI_API_KEY - Your OpenAI API key
  • • RESEND_API_KEY - Your Resend API key (for sending emails)
